title: Urban Alchemy Oasis | ENVELOPE
content: ### Urban Alchemy Oasis. ### Transforming an unloved and dangerous urban lot into an interim park space full of greenery, compassion and beauty. Our work with Urban Alchemy began with Safe Passage Park, where they have been instrumental in its success through ongoing daily stewardship, and has continued with the design and development of the Urban Alchemy Oasis. Urban Alchemy (UA) has been an invaluable partner and resource, working within and building a community in the Tenderloin District of San Francisco. At the Oasis, Urban Alchemy originally intended to create a deployment and training center for its hundreds of practitioners who support the neighborhood. Faced with the growing crisis during COVID, founders soon pivoted to envisioning this space as an opportunity to further build community, gifting two-thirds of the site back to the neighborhood. Working with the Urban Alchemy team, we created a park for peaceful adults to come to sit, play games, and enjoy free coffee, tea, and water, in a safe, clean environment.

title: UA: National Provider of Homelessness Solutions
content: # Urban Alchemy transforms people and places. Urban Alchemy heals neighborhoods by employing the unique talents of returning citizens to transform communities and urban spaces. Damien Rouse’s decision to join Urban Alchemy was inspired by his family. One of Damien’s longstanding goals is to break the cycle of crime, incarceration, and homelessness for his son. Urban Alchemy's Safe Communities initiative addresses public safety concerns through relationship-building. Urban Alchemy's Housed Communities initiative is dedicated to helping people exit homelessness and achieve long-term stability. Kenneth Franklin was one of the first Practitioners to join Urban Alchemy’s HEART team in San Francisco, where he served as a supervisor. Sheila, a long-time Portland resident, was forced to leave her lifelong career as a hairdresser due to the development of arthritis. Positive engagements in 2023 in San Francisco & Oakland. Positive engagements in 2023 in Los Angeles & Culver City. Urban Alchemy in Los Angeles.
